cumulative.notes: US Operation Epic Fury + Israeli Operation Roaring Lion

daily.label: 28 Feb
daily.events: Operation Epic Fury begins. Khamenei assassinated. ~900 strikes in first 12 hours targeting IRGC, air defenses, drone sites, airfields, missile sites, naval facilities, nuclear facilities.

daily.label: 1 Mar
daily.events: Most intense day. B-2 stealth bombers strike hardened missile facilities. ~160 killed at girls' school in Minab (near naval base). Chief of Staff Mousavi and former president Ahmadinejad killed.

daily.label: 2 Mar
daily.events: IRGC Malek-Ashtar building in Tehran destroyed. Hezbollah enters conflict. Iran death toll reaches 555.

daily.label: 3 Mar
daily.events: IRIB (state broadcaster) in Tehran struck. Assembly of Experts gathering in Qom struck by Israeli Air Force. IAEA confirms damage at Natanz nuclear facility. ~4,000 targets struck total.

daily.label: 4 Mar
daily.events: Israel at 1,600 strike sorties. Iran death toll surpasses 1,000. ~2,100 military personnel estimated killed.

daily.label: 5 Mar
daily.events: Iran's president apologizes to neighbors, announces ceasefire toward Gulf states unless attacks originate from their territory.

daily.label: 6 Mar
daily.events: Israeli Air Force strikes 400+ targets, drops ~1,465 munitions on regime military sites. Tehran pounded.

daily.label: 7 Mar
daily.events: Continued strikes on military infrastructure across western and central Iran.

daily.label: 8 Mar
daily.events: Israel strikes Iranian oil facilities for first time: Aghdasieh oil warehouse, Tehran refinery, Shahran oil depot, Karaj oil depot. Toxic smoke blankets Tehran. Mojtaba Khamenei named new Supreme Leader.
